const body = $input.first().json; const clean = (value, fallback = '') => String(value ?? fallback).trim(); const esc = (value) => clean(value).replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>').replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, '''); const url = (value) => /^https?:\/\//i.test(clean(value)) ? clean(value) : ''; const eventType = clean(body.eventType || 'support.request.created'); const to = clean(body.to || body.email || body.userEmail || body.user?.email); if (!to) throw new Error('Missing email recipient.'); const eventMap = { 'support.request.created': ['Support workspace ready', '#2563eb', 'Open request', 'Request received'], 'support.request.submitted': ['Request sent for review', '#475569', 'Track request', 'Request submitted'] }; const event = eventMap[eventType] || ['CogniZap request update', '#2563eb', 'View request', 'Request update']; // Translucent identity mapping for targeted events const styleMap = { 'support.request.created': { accent: '#2563eb', bg: 'transparent', badge: 'WORKSPACE ACTIVE', badgeBg: 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08)', badgeText: '#2563eb', layout: 'created' }, 'support.request.submitted': { accent: '#475569', bg: 'transparent', badge: 'SUBMITTED', badgeBg: 'rgba(71, 85, 105, 0.08)', badgeText: '#475569', layout: 'submitted' } }; const cfg = styleMap[eventType] || { accent: '#2563eb', bg: 'transparent', badge: 'REQUEST UPDATE', badgeBg: 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08)', badgeText: '#2563eb', layout: 'default' }; const title = clean(body.title || body.subject || body.requestTitle || event[0]); const subject = clean(body.subject || event[0]); const message = clean(body.message || body.description || 'There is an update on your CogniZap request.'); const userName = clean(body.userName || body.user?.name || body.metadata?.userName || 'there'); const actionUrl = url(body.actionUrl) || url(body.portalUrl) || 'https://cognizapp.com/support/requests'; const requestId = clean(body.requestId || body.metadata?.requestId || ''); const taskId = clean(body.taskId || body.metadata?.taskId || ''); // Component blocks configured with modern translucent accents let specialBlock = ''; if (cfg.layout === 'created') { specialBlock = `
<>
Interactive Workspace Staged
Your processing terminal is prepared for communication.
`; } else if (cfg.layout === 'submitted') { specialBlock = `
SLA Processing Timeline
 Triage Queue Review Initiated
`; } // Meta Row structures featuring monospace, double-tap copy fields const metaRows = [ requestId && ` Request ID ${esc(requestId)} `, taskId && ` Task ID ${esc(taskId)} `, ` Status ${esc(event[3])} ` ].filter(Boolean).join(''); const html = `
${specialBlock}
CogniZap
Service Management
 ${cfg.badge}

${esc(title)}

Hi ${esc(userName)},

${esc(message).replace(/\n/g, '
')}
${metaRows}
${esc(body.ctaLabel || event[2])}

You received this update message regarding your CogniZap workspace. Automated replies are not monitored.
`; return [{ json: { ok: true, route: 'request', eventType, to, subject, html, text: `${subject}\n\nHi ${userName},\n\n${message}\n\n${actionUrl}`, requestId, taskId, actionUrl } }];

const body = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ok: false, status: 'invalid_gmail_route', message: 'Use type/action notification.email, gmail.send, gmail.list, or an eventType beginning with request/support.request for request email routing.', receivedType: body.receivedType || body.type || body.action || '', eventType: body.eventType || '' } }];

const messages = $input.all().map((item) => item.json);
return [{ json: { ok: true, status: 'gmail_messages_listed', route: 'list', count: messages.length, messages } }];
